title: cyclophyllum brevipes
intro: Cyclophyllum brevipes, also known as the 'Matale wood' or 'Kadoina', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum brevipes include its potential in treating various infections, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Cyclophyllum brevipes is often prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
